Since its existence, the Quiet Skies Program failed to stop a single terrorist attack while costing U.S. taxpayers $200 million a year.

William “Billy” Shaheen, spouse of sitting U.S. New Hampshire Senator, Jeane Shaheen, who traveled with a known or suspected terrorist three times in a single year. The then TSA Administrator Pekoske gave explicit direction to exclude Shaheen from the Silent Partner Quiet Skies list. After Senator Shaheen directly lobbied then former Administrator Pekoske, on her husband’s behalf, Pekoske granted Billy Shaheen a blanket Quiet Skies EXEMPTION.

https://t.co/4INC6cAAbz

tweets.text:
This was a revolting, targeted abuse toward the American people courtesy of Biden and his TSA Administrator, David Pekoske.

DHS uncovered that the Biden administration engaged in an unprecedented campaign of putting U.S. citizens on high-severity, no-fly lists for nonviolent political dissent.

Biden’s TSA abused their authority to punish Americans for reasons “clearly unrelated to transportation security,” including 280 individuals allegedly involved in the January 6 Capitol protests and 19 that merely resisted mask mandates.

@Sec_Noem is referring this case to @TheJusticeDept and Congress for further investigation. President Trump is making good on his promise to end the weaponization of government against Americans. 

The era of punishing patriotism is over.
tweets.text_resolved:
This was a revolting, targeted abuse toward the American people courtesy of Biden and his TSA Administrator, David Pekoske.

DHS uncovered that the Biden administration engaged in an unprecedented campaign of putting U.S. citizens on high-severity, no-fly lists for nonviolent political dissent.

Biden’s TSA abused their authority to punish Americans for reasons “clearly unrelated to transportation security,” including 280 individuals allegedly involved in the January 6 Capitol protests and 19 that merely resisted mask mandates.

@Sec_Noem is referring this case to @TheJusticeDept and Congress for further investigation. President Trump is making good on his promise to end the weaponization of government against Americans. 

The era of punishing patriotism is over.
